bullish: CumTICK Delta Table shows positive accumulation
Price is above the Bollinger Basis and VWAP
bearish: CumTICK Delta Table shows massive negative accumulation (< -1000)
Price is pressing against the lower Bollinger Band and below VWAP
neutral: CumTICK is flat or oscillating near 0
Price is chopping inside the Bollinger Bands and near VWAP

options_0dte_rules.vix_thresholds: If VIX > 20, use Asymmetric/Skewed Iron Condors. If VIX < 15, symmetric Condors are acceptable.
options_0dte_rules.strike_selection: DO NOT blindly trust Pine Script Delta approximations. Always verify against broker Delta. Ideal safe distance is 50+ points (Delta ~0.06 to 0.08).
options_0dte_rules.stop_loss_geometry: Use Zero-Cost Hedge strategy. Set Stop Trigger Buy-at-Close around $2.60 and Limit at $2.85 per leg to ensure the survived leg finances the stopped out leg.

risk_rules: Never sell 0DTE options at strike < 40 points from Spot unless technically protected by Topo do Dia (HOD) / Fundo do Dia (LOD)
Always place Stop-Limit at Max $2.85 for each short leg (Zero-Cost Hedge protocol)
Draw visually a 10-15 point Warning Line before the Short Strike for manual rolling decisions
Monitor '0DTE Strategy Navigator' Output, but cross-reference strikes with Broker Reality
notes: Focused on 0DTE SPX. Focus heavily on CumTICK and VIX macro context.
